description: Print Hive is cloud software for managing fleets of Bambu Lab 3D printers, including job routing, model/file management, and printer monitoring. It also provides AI-assisted print-farm access via MCP and a local HiveLink bridge that connects printers on a local network.
summary: printhiv3d.com exposes one authenticated Streamable HTTP MCP server at `https://api.printhiv3d.com/v1/mcp` and one authenticated REST API at `https://api.hiv3d.com/v1`; both accept either a PrintHive API key or a user Bearer JWT.
